scripts.dev:full: docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml ps 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Up' || docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml up -d && turbo run dev --filter=runes
scripts.backend:reset: docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.dev:reset: docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f pocketbase/docker-compose.yml up -d && turbo run dev --filter=runes
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter=runes build && pnpm --filter=runes exec playwright test --project=chromium
